section_name: Riding in or on Boat or Personal Watercraft Drawn by Vehicle; Offense
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person operates a motor vehicle on a highway or street when a child younger than 18 years of age is occupying a boat or personal watercraft being drawn by the motor vehicle.

(b) It is a defense to prosecution under this section that the person was:

(1) operating the motor vehicle in a parade or in an emergency; or

(2) operating the motor vehicle on a beach.

(c) In this section, “boat” and “personal watercraft” have the meanings assigned by Section 31.003 (Definitions) , Parks and Wildlife Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 545. Operation & Movement of Vehicles
##### § 545.4145 — Riding in or on Boat or Personal Watercraft Drawn by Vehicle; Offense

(a) A person commits an offense if the person operates a motor vehicle on a highway or street when a child younger than 18 years of age is occupying a boat or personal watercraft being drawn by the motor vehicle.

(b) It is a defense to prosecution under this section that the person was:

    (1) operating the motor vehicle in a parade or in an emergency; or

    (2) operating the motor vehicle on a beach.

(c) In this section, “boat” and “personal watercraft” have the meanings assigned by Section 31.003 (Definitions) , Parks and Wildlife Code.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1172 (H.B.2981), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person operates a motor vehicle on a highway or street when a child younger than 18 years of age is occupying a boat or personal watercraft being drawn by the motor vehicle.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: It is a defense to prosecution under this section that the person was:
operating the motor vehicle in a parade or in an emergency; or
operating the motor vehicle on a beach.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: In this section, “boat” and “personal watercraft” have the meanings assigned by Section 31.003 (Definitions) , Parks and Wildlife Code.
